subject: A grand multi-arched stone gateway and plaza of an ornate guildhall, with banners hanging between tall pillared towers and a central rose window above a massive arched entrance
description: A monumental stone plaza dominated by a multi-tiered guildhall facade. A wide arched gateway sits at the center, flanked by clustered columns and tall slender towers capped with conical or domed spires. A large circular rose window crowns the central arch. Long ceremonial banners hang in the spaces between towers. The architecture reads as cathedral-meets-civic-hall, all warm sandstone tones under a hazy sky. The plaza is empty of figures, emphasizing scale and quiet abandonment.
foreground: broad stone-paved plaza approach leading to the central arched gateway
background: tiered guildhall towers, spires, and hazy pale sky
